description: Peec AI is an AI search analytics platform for marketing teams that tracks brand visibility, sentiment, rankings, and cited sources across AI search and assistant platforms. It also provides shopping and project data for customer projects through its app, API, and MCP server.
summary: Peec AI exposes a Customer HTTP API at `https://api.peec.ai/customer/v1` and an MCP server at `https://api.peec.ai/mcp`; both require authentication, with the MCP supporting OAuth or PAT and the HTTP API supporting API key or bearer token auth.
